problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region — specifically Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.
